Title: String Length
Problem_Statement: Read a word and print its length.

Title: First Character
Problem_Statement: Read a word and print first character.

Title: Last Character
Problem_Statement: Read a word and print last character.

Title: Count A
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and print count of 'a'.

Title: Has Digit
Problem_Statement: Read a word and print Yes if it contains a digit else No.

Title: Convert to Uppercase
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and print in uppercase.

Title: Convert to Lowercase
Problem_Statement: Read an uppercase word and print in lowercase.

Title: Count E
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and print count of 'e'.

Title: Starts with A
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and print Yes if starts with 'a' else No.

Title: Ends with Z
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and print Yes if ends with 'z' else No.

Title: Count Vowels
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and print vowel count.

Title: Count Consonants
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase alphabetic word and print consonant count.

Title: Lexicographic Compare
Problem_Statement: Read two words space separated. Print First, Second, or Equal.

Title: Reverse Word
Problem_Statement: Read a word and print reverse.

Title: Count Digits in String
Problem_Statement: Read a word and print number of numeric digit characters.

Title: Replace Vowels X
Problem_Statement: Read a lowercase word and replace all vowels with 'X'. Print result.

Title: Char Frequency
Problem_Statement: Read word and character space separated. Print frequency of char in word.

Title: Is Uppercase Word
Problem_Statement: Read alphabetic word. Print Yes if all letters are uppercase else No.

Title: Concatenate Words
Problem_Statement: Read two words space separated and print them joined together without space.

Title: Print Alternating Chars
Problem_Statement: Read word and print characters at even indices (0, 2, 4...).

Title: Palindrome String Check
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to find if a given string is a palindrome or not.
Read a word. Print 'Palindrome' if it reads the same backwards else 'Not Palindrome'.

Title: Longest Unique Substring
Problem_Statement: Read word and print length of longest substring without repeating characters.

Title: Anagram Check
Problem_Statement: Read two lowercase words space separated. Print Anagram or Not Anagram.

Title: Word Score
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word and print sum of alphabet positions (a=1, b=2... z=26).

Title: Remove Duplicate Chars
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word. Remove consecutive duplicate characters and print result.

Title: Max Frequency Char
Problem_Statement: Read lowercase word. Print the lexicographically smallest character with highest frequency.
